targets.rawSql: SELECT toDate(ts) AS time, ifNull(sumIf(g, g > 0), 0) / 60.0 / 1000.0 AS imported_kwh, ifNull(sumIf(-g, g < 0), 0) / 60.0 / 1000.0 AS exported_kwh FROM (SELECT ts, avgMerge(grid_power) AS g FROM ems.power_1m WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toDate(ts) AS time, ifNull(sumIf(-s, s < 0), 0) / 60.0 / 1000.0 AS solar_produced_kwh FROM (SELECT ts, avgMerge(solar_power) AS s FROM ems.power_1m WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toDate(ts) AS time, ifNull(sum(c), 0) / 60.0 / 1000.0 AS charger_kwh, ifNull(sum(h), 0) / 60.0 / 1000.0 AS heatpump_kwh FROM (SELECT ts, avgMerge(charger_power) AS c, avgMerge(heatpump_power) AS h FROM ems.power_1m WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY ts) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
